text: After driving through all the richest parts of the city, you finally arrive at the university to investigate the crime scene, which is Betty Richman's room.

speaker: Jancy
text: Pretty nice for a dorm room...I guess her parents do have the money for it.

speaker: Jancy
text: Well, I better look around for evidence. It should help me later...
Look around the room and select areas where you might find evidence.
